untranslatable_reason: Signal requires decomposition of volatility into 'transitory' vs 'fundamental' components. Available indicators (hvol_20, bb_bandwidth, atr_20) cannot directly measure transitory volatility caused by uninformed trading activity or order flow imbalance. These microstructure components require tick-level data, bid-ask spreads, and order flow analysis not available in the standard OHLCV indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used hvol_20 > 0.55 to approximate high transitory volatility detection (55% threshold), and bb_bandwidth widening as spread deterioration proxy. However, this is a weak approximation. True implementation requires: (1) bid-ask spread data, (2) order flow imbalance metrics, (3) volatility decomposition model. The signal is fundamentally untranslatable without microstructure data feeds.
